questions.text: When you want to disconnect or take real time off from work — are you good at actually stepping away, or do you find yourself still checking in? What's your philosophy for truly unplugging?
Do you currently work with any kind of coach, mentor, therapist, or guide — someone you intentionally go to for personal or professional growth? Or do you prefer learning on your own?

When you exercise or work out — are you following a specific program with progressive goals, or do you mostly go by how you feel that day? Do you track progress (weights, reps, distances) or just move and see what happens?

What's your grooming and self-care routine like — things like haircuts, skincare, or other personal maintenance? Do you have a specific approach or schedule, or do you just handle it when it comes up?

When you go out for drinks or nightlife — are you mostly a beer/wine person, or do you enjoy exploring cocktails, spirits, or craft drinks? What's your go-to order, and do you like trying new places or returning to favorites?
